flags.note: "Železná ihla dlhá 53 mm, šidlo (135 mm) a pracka s rámikom z bronzového drôtu, so zvyškom železného tŕňa." is a verbless nominal listing continuing the previous sentence. Likely intentional elliptical catalogue style (common in archaeological find descriptions), but technically matches SS21.5 MISSING_WORD -- flagged for human confirmation, not rewritten.

gallery[3]: "Oravy1" -- stray digit "1" glued to end of word, possibly an orphaned footnote marker in the citation title; left unchanged (ambiguous whether to drop or space it). sources[1]: "AJ-, 11, 1891" -- "AJ-," looks like a garbled journal abbreviation (Hungarian source); left unchanged, verbatim foreign citation.
